tools.name: crypto_search_articles
tools.description: Search Cryptopolitan articles by keyword. Returns matching articles with title, summary, author, detected crypto assets, and content type classification.

tools.name: crypto_get_categories
tools.description: Get all available Cryptopolitan article categories with post counts. Use to discover filterable categories for crypto_get_articles.

tools.name: crypto_get_articles
tools.description: Get the latest Cryptopolitan news articles with optional filters by category, asset, and recency. Returns enriched articles with title, summary, author, detected assets, and content type.

tools.name: crypto_get_article_by_url
tools.description: Get detailed information about a specific Cryptopolitan article by its URL or slug. Returns full article metadata including title, summary, author, categories, detected assets, and content type.

tools.name: crypto_get_docs
tools.description: Get documentation about the Cryptopolitan MCP server, available tools, and data schema.

findings.title: Toxic flow: untrusted input can reach an external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: crypto_get_categories, crypto_get_article_by_url · Public sink: crypto_get_categories.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: crypto_get_categories, crypto_get_article_by_url · Public sink: crypto_get_categories

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
